steps.title: Use the claim as a filter
steps.content: The text claims Hedda seeks to influence another person’s fate because she cannot freely determine her own future. The quotation must show a desire to shape someone else’s destiny.

steps.title: Pick the fate quotation
steps.content: Choice A concerns what Hedda should do with herself. Choice C asks whether she has any power, but does not clearly show a wish to shape a fate. Choice D praises another person’s principles. The quotation about having power to mould a human destiny directly illustrates the claim. The answer is B.
